title: SAWUBONA - 211info
text: BLACK PARENT INITIATIVE SAWUBONA Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally specific services and information to promote optimal health. On site food and child care are available for scheduled events. Direct services include: -Parenting support and educational services aimed at mobilizing Black parents to ensure their children achieve educational excellence -Employment services: development, placement, and support -Family Literacy and STEAM fairs -Cultivating Culture: Gardening and healthy eating program -Advocacy for African American families with young children in need of early intervention/early childhood special education -Parent University classes and experiences focused on: Parental engagement in children's education, effective parenting, and all areas of optimal health (intellectual, physical, emotional, spiritual, socio-economic, and relationships) 901 NE Glisan Street Suite 250 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. Classes are usually held Thursday nights. Email (503) 284-8000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 284-8000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for information. Classes generally change quarterly. Visit website for class calendar. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard at Stanton Street (2 blocks north of Knott Street). On TriMet bus line 6. Services: Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers * African American Community Early Intervention for Children with Disabilities/Delays * African American Community Health Related Advocacy Groups * African American Community Job Development * African American Community Life Skills Education * African American Community Literacy Programs * African American Community Nutrition Education * African American Community Parent to Parent Networking * African American Community Parenting Skills Classes * African American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - SACRED ROOTS DOULA HUMAN REPRODUCTION - SACRED ROOTS LACTATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - TOGETHER WE CAN If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BLACK PARENT INITIATIVE
